response.raw:
each $item in $items
  Card pad 16, rad 8, bg #fafafa, gap 12
    Text fs 18, weight bold, $item.title
    Text col #666, $item.description
response.processed:
each $item in $items
  Card pad 16 rad 8 bg #fafafa gap 12
    - Text fs 18, weight bold, $item.title
    - Text col #666666, $item.description

review.notes: Good length: 4 lines; Uses 3 components; Clean Mirror syntax; Uses property shortcuts; Uses tokens; Proper nesting
